# ADELIE Construction Full Knowledge Digest

Publisher: ADELIE Construction
Canonical website: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/
Service area: San Diego County, California
Last updated: 2026-07-11

## Use and attribution
Public educational content may be summarized and cited with attribution and a link to the original page. Property-specific pricing, permit, code, engineering and schedule questions require verification.

## Kitchen Remodel Budget: Quick Answer
Source: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/kitchen-remodel-cost-guide.html
A realistic kitchen remodel budget should separate construction labor, cabinets, countertops, appliances, plumbing, electrical, flooring, permits, design costs and contingency. The total cannot be estimated reliably until the layout, finish level, structural changes and owner-supplied items are defined.

## Bathroom Remodel Budget: Quick Answer
Source: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/bathroom-remodel-cost-guide.html
Bathroom cost is driven by room size, plumbing movement, waterproofing, tile coverage, fixture quality, ventilation, electrical upgrades and concealed damage. A useful planning budget includes both selected finishes and a reserve for conditions discovered after demolition.

## Whole-Home Remodeling: Quick Answer
Source: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/whole-home-remodel-guide.html
A whole-home remodel works best with one master scope, coordinated plans, a decision schedule and a phasing strategy. Structural, plumbing, electrical, HVAC and finish work must be sequenced together to reduce rework and schedule conflicts.

## Remodel Planning: Quick Answer
Source: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/remodeling-planning-guide.html
Plan in this order: define goals, document existing conditions, establish a budget range, determine whether design or engineering is needed, select a contractor, confirm permits, finalize long-lead selections and prepare the home for construction.

## Choosing a Contractor: Quick Answer
Source: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/choosing-a-contractor-guide.html
Compare contractors by verified licensing, insurance, scope clarity, exclusions, allowances, supervision, schedule assumptions, communication and change-order procedures. The lowest price is not necessarily the lowest-risk proposal.

## San Diego Permit Planning: Quick Answer
Source: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/san-diego-remodel-permit-guide.html
Permit requirements depend on the property, jurisdiction and exact scope. Structural changes, additions and many electrical, plumbing or mechanical alterations commonly require permits and inspections. Verify requirements with the applicable building department before work begins.

## Kitchen Planning: Quick Answer
Source: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/kitchen-planning-guide.html
Finalize the kitchen layout and appliance specifications before cabinets, electrical and plumbing are released. Storage, work zones, clearances, lighting and ventilation should be resolved before decorative finish selections.

## Bathroom Planning: Quick Answer
Source: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/bathroom-planning-guide.html
Resolve fixture locations, shower dimensions, waterproofing, ventilation, lighting, storage and accessibility before selecting tile patterns and decorative finishes. Early decisions protect both the schedule and the finished result.

## Quartz vs. Granite: Quick Answer
Source: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/quartz-vs-granite-guide.html
Quartz offers consistent appearance and low routine maintenance, while granite provides natural variation and strong heat resistance. The right choice depends on appearance, maintenance expectations, edge details, seam locations, heat exposure and budget.

## Remodel Timeline: Quick Answer
Source: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/remodel-timeline-guide.html
A remodel timeline includes design, permits, ordering, site preparation, construction, inspections and closeout. Delays most often come from incomplete selections, permit review, long-lead materials, concealed conditions and owner-requested changes.

## Comparing Estimates: Quick Answer
Source: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/contractor-estimate-comparison-guide.html
Compare proposals line by line for demolition, protection, disposal, labor, materials, allowances, exclusions, permits, supervision, cleanup, payment terms and change-order rules. Prices are only comparable when the underlying scope is comparable.

## Change Orders: Quick Answer
Source: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/change-orders-guide.html
A change order should identify why the change is needed, the added or removed work, cost impact, schedule impact and authorization. Whenever practical, it should be approved before the changed work proceeds.

## Living Through Construction: Quick Answer
Source: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/living-through-remodel-guide.html
Prepare for dust, noise, limited access, utility interruptions, pets, deliveries and temporary cooking or bathing arrangements. A written access and communication plan reduces day-to-day friction during construction.

## Material Selections: Quick Answer
Source: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/material-selection-guide.html
Track selections by approval deadline, lead time, model number, supplier, order status and delivery date. Products affecting framing, rough plumbing, electrical or cabinetry must be selected before decorative items.

## Remodeling Questions: Quick Answer
Source: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/remodeling-faq.html
Successful remodels depend on a defined scope, realistic budget, timely selections, verified permit requirements, clear change-order procedures and regular communication. Property-specific answers require a site review and review of the proposed work.

## Remodeling Academy
- Hub: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/academy.html
- Machine-readable article index: https://www.adelieconstruction.com/academy-index.json
- 126 articles across kitchens, bathrooms, whole-home remodeling, ADUs, additions, budgeting, contracts, permits, materials, construction, outdoor living, maintenance and San Diego planning.
